## Problem Statement
Describe the problem this feature solves or the use case it addresses.

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution or feature.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, examples, or mockups here.

## Related Issues
Link to any related issues.
